service: AI Voice Agent Demo — Swedish Real Estate

challenges.impact: Without something tangible, conversations stall before they even begin — no demo, no deals
Realtors need to hear a voice agent that speaks their language and handles their specific context
A one-sided script limits your pitching flexibility — you need to show the full picture

challenges.area: No way to adapt for new prospects
challenges.impact: Rebuilding from scratch for every pitch wastes time and slows your market testing

approach.body:
You're in market validation mode — which means speed and credibility matter more than perfection right now. The goal of this build isn't just a working demo; it's a sales weapon you can walk into any realtor meeting with and immediately show.

Built on real infrastructure (Twilio + Retell AI), with a Swedish number and a script that handles both buyer and seller scenarios, this demo will look and sound like a finished product — because it is.

items.activity: Twilio account setup and Swedish phone number provisioning (+46)
items.benefit: A real Swedish number realtors can call directly — no workarounds

items.activity: Retell AI platform configuration and account setup
items.benefit: Production-grade voice AI infrastructure, not a prototype

items.activity: Twilio ↔ Retell AI integration and call routing
items.benefit: Calls connect instantly and reliably — no lag during your pitch

items.activity: End-to-end connectivity test before agent build begins
items.benefit: Confirms the infrastructure works before we put content on top

items.activity: Custom prompt built specifically for Swedish real estate
items.benefit: The agent understands property terminology, local market context, and realtor workflows

items.activity: Dual-track script: buyer enquiry flow + seller listing flow
items.benefit: Covers both the most common call types — shows realtors the full range

items.activity: Tone and language calibration (natural Swedish phrasing)
items.benefit: The agent sounds like it belongs in the Swedish market, not a translated script

items.activity: Handling common objections and off-topic questions
items.benefit: The agent stays professional and on-script even when callers go off-piste

items.activity: Internal QA testing across both call scenarios
items.benefit: Every flow tested by us before you ever show it to a prospect
You pitch with confidence — we keep adjusting until it's exactly right
Changes applied cleanly and tested after each round — no regression

items.activity: Loom training video: how to update the prompt yourself
items.benefit: Tweak the script for different prospect types without needing us every time

items.activity: Full handoff documentation (platform access, call flow diagram)
items.benefit: Everything you need to demo, explain, and manage the system independently

investment.roi_framing: A demo built on real infrastructure that you can walk into a realtor meeting with tomorrow — pays for itself the moment you close your first client.

bonuses.detail: Structured intake form to capture client details before every new build — takes under 10 minutes and makes every future engagement faster
$250 discount applied in exchange for a short video testimonial once the demo is live — bringing your total to $550

next_steps: Confirm — Formal acceptance of this proposal and scope
Payment — Full payment upfront to begin
Onboarding — Complete the onboarding form (provided on confirmation) — takes under 10 minutes
Kick-off — Align on script direction and Swedish number provisioning before Day 1

terms.detail: Includes: Twilio setup, Swedish number, Retell AI config, dual-track real estate prompt, unlimited revisions, training video, handoff docs. Excluded: ongoing management, additional languages/markets, CRM integration, Twilio/Retell subscription costs (billed directly to client)
Bug fixes included for 7 days post-handoff. Change requests after final handoff quoted separately
The $250 discount is conditional on a short video testimonial (1–2 min) within 14 days of delivery
All systems delivered are client property. Arcaflow retains no ongoing access after handoff unless on retainer
